description:
You are an online merchant who uses Vtiger CRM to manage your product catalog. Add a new product to the inventory with the following details:

- Product Name: Bamboo Standing Desk Pro
- Unit Price: 549.99
- No of Units per Pack: 1
- Quantity In Stock: 150
- Reorder Level: 25
- Quantity In Demand: 12
- Product Active: Yes
- Handler: Admin User
- Description: Adjustable bamboo standing desk with dual motor lift system. 60x30 inch desktop surface, supports up to 350 lbs. Features built-in cable management and 4 programmable height presets. Eco-friendly bamboo construction with 5-year warranty.
